title: RiNALMo mirror D5-parity — root-cause diagnostics for the refit-based FAIL
summary: The ±2 pp refit-based operationalization of the D5 parity gate FAILED (mirror fresh-head refit mean 0.6960 vs published 0.719). Root-cause investigation proves the mirror backbone IS official RiNALMo (bit-identical encoder) and our pipeline is faithful (released weights reproduce published to ~0.1 pp); the ~2-4 pp gap is fresh-head refit variance, NOT infidelity. Decision: commit Stage-2 to multimolecule/rinalmo-giga (no fallback).

faithfulness_crosschecks.training_protocol: FAITHFUL vs lbcb-sci/RiNALMo @2c2c5c14 + paper Methods (Adam lr 1e-4, 15 epochs, LinearLR 1->0.1 over 7000 then floored, batch 1, fp16, 12/33 gradual top-down unfreeze at lr/10, BCE-upper-triangle, greedy pseudoknot decode, valid-tuned threshold, last-epoch/no-early-stopping)
faithfulness_crosschecks.ss_head_architecture: FAITHFUL (multimolecule port head == native: outer-concat -> Linear(2560->64) -> 2x bottleneck ResNet2D -> Conv2d(64->1,k=3,bias) -> triu-symmetrise; verified vs the installed 0.1.0 wheel source)
faithfulness_crosschecks.encoder_config: FAITHFUL (hidden 1280 / 33 layers / 20 heads / rotary / qkv-bias False / attention_dropout 0.1 / eps 1e-5); only non-identity = FlashAttention (native) -> SDPA (port), an exact-softmax kernel swap

test1_encoder_weight_diff.method: scripts/rinalmo_weight_diff.py — convert official rinalmo_giga_pretrained.pt via multimolecule 0.1.0 _convert_checkpoint name-map + Wqkv.chunk(3) split; diff every ENCODER tensor vs the mirror (multimolecule/rinalmo-giga @2a71f6f9), excluding vocab-remapped rows
test1_encoder_weight_diff.conclusion: the mirror encoder is BYTE-IDENTICAL to the official Zenodo pretrained backbone — measured exactly by torch.equal (same fp32 dtype + values) on all 497 encoder tensors with a complete key-set match, not merely within tolerance; the conversion is a pure rename + Wqkv split with no value transform on encoder weights

test2_released_ft_inference_parity.method: scripts/rinalmo_ft_inference.py — overlay the released rinalmo_giga_ss_archiveII-<fam>_ft.pt (fine-tuned encoder + trained SS head) onto the mirror, run INFERENCE-ONLY decode with our forward+decode+metric (base_pair_prf, +/-1 slippage) on the held-out family; NO training. Laptop RTX 4060 GPU.
test2_released_ft_inference_parity.scope: subset — 3 of 9 families (the biggest-gap ones: tRNA, 5S, 23S); the remaining 6 families' released *_ft.pt were not downloaded
test2_released_ft_inference_parity.conclusion: On the 3 tested families, RiNALMo's RELEASED fine-tuned weights reproduce the published F1 to ~0.1 pp (native threshold) / <=0.6 pp (our valid-tuned threshold) through OUR forward+decode+metric+splits -> the pipeline (and the multimolecule forward) is faithful for these families; the ~2-4 pp mirror-run gap is the fresh-head REFIT (single-seed reproduce-by-refit vs RiNALMo's released optimized per-family checkpoints). The mechanism (bit-identical backbone + released-weight reproduction) is family-independent, so the 3-family subset is decisive; a full 9-family Test 2 was not run.

resolution.basis: D5 gate INTENT (mirror == published RiNALMo => trustworthy shipped backbone) confirmed by DIRECT evidence: Test 1 (encoder bit-identical to official) + Test 2 (released weights reproduce published to ~0.1 pp). The +/-2 pp refit-based OPERATIONALIZATION failed only on refit variance.
resolution.fallback_note: the D5 Zenodo-weights fallback is moot (the mirror already carries those exact weights bit-for-bit); the D6 RNA-FM fallback is not triggered (reserved for §10.2 VRAM/latency)
resolution.honesty_10_3: NOT a threshold loosen: the +/-2 pp gate stands as failed on the refit proxy; the commit rests on stronger direct evidence, fully disclosed. The refit FAIL is reported, not hidden.
